pi_items.source: Web search confirms the 1949 book by Shannon and Weaver is titled 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication'.

pi_items.metadata_value: Recent Contributions to the Mathematical Theory of Communication
pi_items.verified_value: Recent Contributions to the Mathematical Theory of Communication
pi_items.source: Web search confirms Warren Weaver's contribution in the book is titled 'Recent Contributions to the Mathematical Theory of Communication'.
Web search confirms Claude E. Shannon's contribution is titled 'The Mathematical Theory of Communication'.
Web search confirms that in the original 1949 hardcover edition, Weaver's section was on pages 93-117. Pages 1-28 correspond to the 1963 paperback reprint where the order of authors was swapped.
Web search confirms that in the original 1949 hardcover edition, Shannon's section was on pages 3-91. Pages 29-125 correspond to the 1963 paperback reprint where the order of authors was swapped.

privileged_info_summary: The Zotero database is synthetically seeded via setup scripts. Web search verifies the titles for the book and its sections by Shannon and Weaver. However, the task description and verifier incorrectly combine the page numbers of the 1963 paperback edition (Weaver: 1-28, Shannon: 29-125) with the publication year of the original 1949 hardcover edition (where Weaver was 93-117 and Shannon was 3-91), creating a historical contradiction.
